rulings.Case Title: MARY WILLIAMS VS. MERCY HOUSING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt Summ Adj; Evidence
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 5, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA X's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted burden. Opposing party failed to provide admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Ntc Of Mtn For An Order Granting Relief From Pltf'S Failure To File A Memo Of Costs On Or Before Dec 9, 2013

PLAINTIFF CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's Amended Motion For An Order Granting Relief From Plaubtuff's Failure To File A Memo Of Costs On Or Before Dec 9, 2013 Continued to March 5, 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition no later than February 14, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOUNIR KARDOSH VS. JOHN HAYES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf To Tax Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 5, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF MOUNIR KARDOSH's Motion By Plaintiff To Tax Costs GRANTED. Defendant's request for attorney's fees in opposition to the motion is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MF FUND III, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. WILFREDO TABAJONDA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 5, 2014, line 8. PLAINTIFF MF FUND III, LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burden and show that title under the sale has been duly perfected at the time "3 Day Notice" was served. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 424 JESSIE HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC VS. STAR BRADLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Def Star Bradley'S Attendance At Deposition, Responses To Form Interrogatories - General, Responses To Form Interrogatories - Unlawful Detainer, Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, And To Deem Admitted The Truth Of Requests For Admission, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 5, 2014, line 9. PLAINTIFF 424 JESSIE HISTORIC PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant Star Bradley's Attendance At Deposition, Responses To Form Interrogatories Hearing Required.
